personas.label: MCP/tool maintainer
personas.what_to_show: AgentSec manifest receipt, HOLD/BLOCK examples, and claim ceiling.
personas.what_to_ask: Which manifest fields or permission-scope warnings would make the review more useful?

personas.label: AI coding workflow builder
personas.what_to_show: QIRA task packet, behavior contract, release-gate receipt, and second-run delta.
personas.what_to_ask: Which missing CI or reviewer evidence should keep a patch on HOLD?

personas.label: Data steward
personas.what_to_show: DataCapsule manifest-only receipt, use-boundary table, and known limits.
personas.what_to_ask: Which source, rights, privacy, or eval-overlap fields are missing?

personas.label: Founder/operator
personas.what_to_show: Unified portfolio dashboard and external-safe share pack.
personas.what_to_ask: Is the workflow understandable enough for a bounded customer-discovery conversation?

personas.label: Developer tool researcher
personas.what_to_show: Packet -> check/probe -> receipt -> ALLOW/HOLD/BLOCK -> feedback memory.
personas.what_to_ask: Which parts look like reusable developer-tool primitives, and which remain unclear?

personas.label: AI governance reviewer
personas.what_to_show: Claim-boundary sheets, do-not-send guard, and feedback triage taxonomy.
personas.what_to_ask: Which claim boundaries should be clearer before any broader distribution?

personas.label: Security-minded engineer
personas.what_to_show: AgentSec and QIRA HOLD/BLOCK examples plus no-live-execution limits.
personas.what_to_ask: Which negative controls or review questions should be added before a real local pilot?
